entity.summary: Berachain concentrated-liquidity decentralized exchange based on a Uniswap V3 design, with residual protocol liquidity and historical DEX activity but negligible current usage in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Beralis V3 as a Berachain Uniswap V3 fork and reports residual TVL but zero recent 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour fee activity, alongside very small cumulative DEX volume. The registry page also carries user-concern warnings. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead status and leaves URL fields unset because a stable first-party website was not recovered.

evidence.title: Beralis DEX official social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used only for identity corroboration, not for terminal-state classification.

evidence.title: Beralis V3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Beralis V3 as a Berachain CLMM/Uniswap V3 fork and reports residual TVL, zero recent fee activity, very small cumulative volume, and a caution warning, supporting conservative limited classification.

evidence.title: Beralis V3 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Beralis V3 as a Berachain decentralized exchange; current metrics are used to avoid overstating activity.
